<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]][[de:Metall-Hund]][[hak:Kâng-sut]][[ja:庚戌]][[ko:경술]][[vi:Canh Tuất]][[za:Gengswt]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]][[zh-yue:庚戌]][[zh:庚戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]][[de:Metall-Hund]][[hak:Kâng-sut]][[ja:庚戌]][[ko:경술]][[vi:Canh Tuất]][[za:Gengswt]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]][[zh-yue:庚戌]][[zh:庚戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]][[de:Metall-Hund]][[hak:Kâng-sut]][[ja:庚戌]][[ko:경술]][[vi:Canh Tuất]][[za:Gengswt]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]][[zh-yue:庚戌]][[zh:庚戌]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|WD=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Earth generates Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Dog (庚戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: koushu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongsul (경술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất

<!--
==
* Yang Metal Dog (庚戌) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gang1 zeoi3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのえいぬ (kanoe-inu)
***Onyomi: こうかのいぬ (kōka-no-inu)
***Onyomi: こうじゅつ (kōjutsu)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyeongsuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất

-->
==Years of Yang Metal Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 50 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Metal Dog (庚戌)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 50|en|AD 50|WD=Q30310|lt=50 AD|1=AD 50}}
* {{ill|AD 110|en|AD 110|WD=Q30631|lt=110 AD|1=AD 110}}* {{ill|170|en|170|WD=Q31282|lt=170 AD|1=170}}
* {{ill|230|en|230|WD=Q30323|lt=230 AD|1=230}}
* {{ill|290|en|290|WD=Q32320|lt=290 AD|1=290}}
* {{ill|350|en|350|WD=Q30544|lt=350 AD|1=350}}
* {{ill|410|en|410|WD=Q30161|lt=410 AD|1=410}}
* {{ill|470|en|470|WD=Q32114|lt=470 AD|1=470}}
* {{ill|530|en|530|WD=Q30894|lt=530 AD|1=530}}
* {{ill|590|en|590|WD=Q32710|lt=590 AD|1=590}}
* {{ill|650|en|650|WD=Q30179|lt=650 AD|1=650}}
* {{ill|710|en|710|WD=Q23518|lt=710 AD|1=710}}
* {{ill|770|en|770|WD=Q25021|lt=770 AD|1=770}}
* {{ill|830|en|830|WD=Q30456|lt=830 AD|1=830}}
* {{ill|890|en|890|WD=Q30481|lt=890 AD|1=890}}
* {{ill|950|en|950|WD=Q23449|lt=950 AD|1=950}}
|
* {{ill|1010|en|1010|WD=Q19237|lt=1010 AD|1=1010}}
* {{ill|1070|en|1070|WD=Q19428|lt=1070 AD|1=1070}}
* {{ill|1130|en|1130|WD=Q19562|lt=1130 AD|1=1130}}
* {{ill|1190|en|1190|WD=Q19736|lt=1190 AD|1=1190}}
* {{ill|1250|en|1250|WD=Q5487|lt=1250 AD|1=1250}}
* {{ill|1310|en|1310|WD=Q5729|lt=1310 AD|1=1310}}
* {{ill|1370|en|1370|WD=Q6217|lt=1370 AD|1=1370}}
* {{ill|1430|en|1430|WD=Q6342|lt=1430 AD|1=1430}}
* {{ill|1490|en|1490|WD=Q6669|lt=1490 AD|1=1490}}
* {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550 AD|1=1550}}
* {{ill|1610|en|1610|WD=Q6765|lt=1610 AD|1=1610}}
* {{ill|1670|en|1670|WD=Q7606|lt=1670 AD|1=1670}}
* {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730 AD|1=1730}}
* {{ill|1790|en|1790|WD=Q7775|lt=1790 AD|1=1790}}
* {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850 AD|1=1850}}
* {{ill|1910|en|1910|WD=Q2075|lt=1910 AD|1=1910}}
* {{ill|1970|en|1970|WD=Q2474|lt=1970 AD|1=1970}}
|
* {{ill|2030|en|2030|WD=Q12799|lt=2030 AD|1=2030}}
* {{ill|2090 AD|ja|2090年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2090|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2090 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2090年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2150 AD|ja|2150年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2150|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2150 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2210 AD|ja|2210年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2210|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2210 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2270 AD|ja|2270年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2270|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2270 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2330 AD|ja|2330年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2330|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2330 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2390 AD|ja|2390年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2390|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2390 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2450 AD|ja|2450年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2450|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2450 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2510 AD|ja|2510年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2510|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2510 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2570 AD|ja|2570年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2570|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2570 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2630 AD|ja|2630年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2630|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2630 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2690 AD|ja|2690年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2690|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2690 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2750 AD|ja|2750年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2750|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2750 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2810 AD|ja|2810年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2810|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2810 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2870 AD|ja|2870年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2870|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2870 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2930 AD|ja|2930年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2930|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2930 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2990 AD|ja|2990年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2990|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2990 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Dog==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
None.
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kap-chú]]
[[zh-yue:甲寅]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Metal Dog|qq=ja|庚戌|version=98658343|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Gák-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Tigeri]]
[[de:Yang Metal Dog]]

[[ja:庚戌]]

[[zh:庚戌]]
[[ko:경술]]
[[fr:Chien de métal]]
[[de:Metall-Hund]]

[[af:Aardetier (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Tigreen]]
[[en:Earth Tiger]]
[[fr:Tigre de terreboishak]]
[[it:Kap-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:갑인]]
[[vi:Giáp Dần]]
[[za:Gyapceij]]
[[zh:甲寅]]
[[ar:Yang Metal Dog]]

<!--Yang Metal Dog--><!--Yang Metal Dog-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Kâng-sut]]
[[vi:Canh Tuất]]
[[za:Gengswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]]
[[zh-yue:庚戌]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalhond (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gĕng-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Kâng-sut]]
[[vi:Canh Tuất]]
[[za:Gengswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-sut]]
[[zh-yue:庚戌]]
{{wikidata link|Q904484}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
